summary_one_line: Input must carry a parseable sfnt/cmap table structure so get_glyph_funcZ resolves a glyph (ret true) and the cache-set branch is taken.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A valid OpenType/sfnt container: sfnt version magic 00 01 00 00 at offset 0, a table directory naming the 'cmap' tag, and a well-formed cmap subtable whose get_glyph lookup returns a glyph for some unicode codepoint, so that this->get_glyph_funcZ produces ret=true at line 1913.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winning vpc seed begins 00 01 00 00 (sfnt version) and contains the literal ASCII tag 'cmap' plus a font-table tag region; this lets get_glyph_funcZ resolve glyphs (W enters the cache->set body and the per-arm hitcount on the branch is 21867), so cache && ret is true.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The value_profile loser seeds are short (13-68 byte) random byte blobs with no sfnt magic and no 'cmap' tag, so get_glyph_funcZ never returns a glyph (ret stays false); the loser blocks on the false side with avg hitcount 0 on the branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator, which copies CMP operands captured by the CmpLogObserver directly into the input at the comparison offset. The 4-byte table-tag / sfnt-version comparisons inside harfbuzz's OpenType parser are exactly the equality CMPs I2S substitution solves, planting 'cmap'/00010000 magic that plain value_profile (no I2SRandReplace, only CMP_MAP distance buckets) does not reproduce within budget.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of 'if (cache && ret)' inside _cached_get; ret comes from get_glyph_funcZ.
The blocked side is the true branch and the line is the named blocker.
The winning seed begins with the sfnt version magic and contains the literal cmap table tag.
The winner resolves all 10 trials and the loser blocks all 10 with zero hitcount on the branch.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=21867  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The loser-blocking seeds are short random byte blobs lacking font structure.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: Seed 1 (id=0003cbd2b6f5fff8, size=13 bytes, fuzzer=value_profile, trial=1, discovered_at=102s, mutation_op=BitFlipMutator,BytesDeleteMutator,WordAddMutator):

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that the winner uses to substitute CMP operands.
The value_profile loser has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only CMP_MAP distance buckets.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5434 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed fd117cd3e66df32b`; the chain has 48 levels and the trailing I2S-floor signal reports 1 ancestor dash row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 47, the floor signal of an I2SRandReplace find in vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: value_profile resolving the true branch in a majority of trials within the same budget once given a corpus seed that already contains the sfnt magic and a valid cmap subtable, showing I2S substitution is not the limiting factor.

weakest_evidence_point: Only one winning seed is shown, so the inference that the 'cmap' tag and sfnt magic are I2S-planted rather than havoc-inserted rests on the single dash row at depth 47 plus the structural read of that one seed.
